Reward: Take 3 Shinies from The Bank.
Flavor Text: Pull hard, dig in, and pretend the rope isn’t actively trying to remove your paws.

Reward: Draft Lineup Slot 2 and take any Shinies on it for free.
Flavor Text: Brakes are optional. Ethics are flexible. Speed is mandatory.

Reward: Draw 2 from Recruit Deck. Keep 1. Place other on bottom.
Flavor Text: The orange ones hide behind the tire swing. Trust me. I called dibs in advance.

Reward: Look at top 5 of Recruit Deck. Take 1. Put the rest back in any order.
Flavor Text: I knew you'd pick the blue shell. I also knew you'd regret it.

Reward: Choose one opponent: Take 1 Shiny or 1 random card from their hand.
Flavor Text: The pebble isn't under any cup. The pebble is in my pocket. The cups are a metaphor.

Reward: Perform one free Scramble.
Flavor Text: I wasn’t moving. I was rewinding my position to three seconds ago. The judge can’t prove anything.

Requirements: 2 cards: Same faction + consecutive ranks (e.g. Super-Dupes-4 + Super-Dupes-5)
Reward: Choose one opponent: Take 1 Shiny from them.
Flavor Text: We trained for this all season. They brought oranges. We brought intensity. And more oranges.

Reward: Choose one opponent: Take 2 Shinies from them.
Flavor Text: One provides the muscle. One provides the wheels. Physics provides the humiliation.

Reward: Choose one opponent: Take 1 random card from their hand.
Flavor Text: I predict the ribbon is in the flower pot. I also predict it will look better in my trophy case.

Reward: Perform one free Scramble.
Flavor Text: The Magician distracts the goalie with a card trick. The Finder grabs the flag. It's not cheating; it's strategic misdirection.

Reward: Choose one opponent: They discard 1 card of their choice from their hand to The Stands.
Flavor Text: We mapped the tire swing trajectory. We calculated the mud viscosity. Mistakes were made.

Reward: Look through top 5 cards in The Stands. Take 1 card into hand.
Flavor Text: The best hiding spot is inside the snack cupboard. No one looks there because they assume it's already empty.

Reward: Swap 1 card from your hand with 1 card in any Lineup slot. Slide and refill.
Flavor Text: Coach’s orders. You’re benched. No hard feelings—just loud feelings and interpretive huffing.

Reward: Perform one free Scramble.
Flavor Text: Left, right, left! Stop stepping on my tail! Maintain formation!

Reward: Take 2 Shinies from The Bank.
Flavor Text: Timing is everything. Speed is nothing. Precision wins the race.

Requirements: 2 Pairs of numbers (e.g. two 4s and two 7s, 4 cards total)
Reward: Choose one opponent: Take 1 Shiny from them.
Flavor Text: Nose clips on. Kick! Splash! Smile! If one of us sinks, we all sink. That is the pact.

Reward: Look through top 5 cards in The Stands. Take 1 card into hand.
Flavor Text: Just wave at the crowd. Try to look like you practiced. Do not eat the confetti.

Reward: Draft Lineup Slot 2 and take any Shinies on it for free.
Flavor Text: We have flattened ourselves like pancakes. The bar is a suggestion, not a limit.

Reward: Take 4 Shinies from The Bank.
Flavor Text: I have claimed the summit of Mount Sofa. The Cushions are my ramparts. None shall pass.

Reward: Look through top 5 cards in The Recruit Deck. Take 2 cards in hand and discard the others.
Flavor Text: We called dibs on the entire playground. You can have the swings tomorrow. Maybe.

Reward: Draft Lineup Slot 2 and take any Shinies on it for free.
Flavor Text: It's a toaster on skateboard wheels. It has no brakes. It is glorious.

Reward: Choose one opponent: Take 1 random card from their hand. Give them 1 card from your hand (your choice).
Flavor Text: For my next trick, the opposing team will vanish! And by vanish, I mean 'get distracted by a shiny object.'

Reward: Look through top 5 cards in The Stands. Take up to 2 cards into hand.
Flavor Text: We are burying this bone for future generations. Or for next Tuesday. Whenever we get hungry.

Reward: Draw top 3 of Recruit Deck. Keep 1. Discard 2 to The Stands.
Flavor Text: The chalkboard is full of diagrams. The plan is perfect. Who drew a cat on the map?

Reward: Each opponent either discards 1 card of their choice to The Stands or pays you 1 Shiny.
Flavor Text: We need a bigger shelf. And more polish. This collection is getting heavy.

Reward: Choose an opponent. They either pay you 1 Shiny or give you 1 card of their choice from their hand.
Flavor Text: Link paws. Hold the line. The cookie jar will be defended.

Reward: Draw 2 Playbooks. Keep 1. Put other on bottom. (If no Playbooks: draw 2 from Recruit Deck. Keep 1, discard other to The Stands.)
Flavor Text: My bracket is perfect. I predicted the underdog would trip. It was statistically inevitable.

Requirements: 4x Time Travelers. Sum ≥ 22. Max 1 Free Agent.
Reward: Look through top 5 cards in The Stands. Take up to 2 cards into hand.
Flavor Text: Did he cross the line? Let's rewind the tape. Frame by frame. See? He was definitely napping.

Reward: Choose one: Perform Free Scramble or Draft card from Slot 1 and take any Shinies on it.
Flavor Text: Pit crew! Tires! Fuel! Snacks! Faster! FASTER! We lost 0.003 seconds to a banana peel and I took that personally.

Reward: Choose one opponent: Look at 1 Playbook in their hand. Return it. (If no Playbooks: look at their entire hand.)
Flavor Text: The game is the opener. The real show begins when the pyrotechnics— I mean, sparkles—go off.

Reward: Draft any Lineup card for free. Take up to 2 Shinies from that card. Return any extra Shinies on it to the Bank.
Flavor Text: The bar is underground now. Physics has left the building.

Reward: Take one additional full turn immediately after this turn ends. On that extra turn, you may not Complete an Event.
Flavor Text: The ref blew the whistle, but we're still running! The game isn't over until we say it's over!

Reward: Draft Lineup Slots 2 & 3 and take any Shinies from those cards for free. Slide and refill.
Flavor Text: The timer clicked! The ground is erupting! Abandon the field! Save the snacks!

Reward: Look at top 5 of Recruit Deck. Keep 2. Put other 3 on bottom in any order.
Flavor Text: It's not 'cheating.' It's 'advanced scouting.' We know their plays before they do.

Requirements: 3 cards from 3 different factions. Sum exactly 11.
Reward: If any opponent has more VP than you: choose one of them; they discard 2 cards from their hand to The Stands. Otherwise: take 2 Shinies from the Bank.
Flavor Text: The clock hit zero. The crowd held its breath. Then someone sneezed and everything happened at once.

Requirements: 4 cards with the same number (any factions)
Reward: Discard all Lineup/Jumbotron cards to bottom of their decks and refill. All Shinies from discarded Lineup cards go to new recruit in Slot 4.
Flavor Text: We’re doing a full reset. Fresh lineup, fresh events, fresh lies about ‘having a plan.’”

Requirements: One card showing each of the six faction symbols (6 cards total)
Reward: None.
Flavor Text: Okay, everyone squeeze in. Tall monsters in the back. Stop making faces. This is for posterity.
